untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detection of a V-top pattern with a minimum [THRESHOLD_NEEDED]-day downturn confirmation period. Pattern recognition (V-top vs broader formations) and multi-day downturn duration tracking cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. The exact threshold parameter [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] is undefined in the source material.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture the directional bias (SHORT on price weakness below prior highs and moving average) but the core V-top pattern detection logic requires custom pattern recognition functions not available in the indicator set. The signal would need a dedicated V-top pattern detector function or multi-bar lookback logic to properly validate downturn duration and confirm the V-shaped reversal formation.
